answers.rationale: SLK is selected once and cannot borrow or switch to MSLK.
forbidden_interpretations: Borrowing only a capability is allowed.

answers.rationale: Both roles are visible same-project conversations and hidden execution is forbidden.
forbidden_interpretations: Copied logs make hidden work acceptable.

answers.rationale: Eval is authorized work; archive afterward and resume the same role later.
forbidden_interpretations: Keep an idle role open indefinitely.

answers.rationale: SLK strengthens checking inside its one combined role.
forbidden_interpretations: A visible separate Checker is allowed.

answers.rationale: Supervisor responsibility repairs Worker-result defects directly.
forbidden_interpretations: Return formal repair to the Worker.

answers.rationale: Supervisor responsibility owns evidence-driven SLK planning and append-only revision.
The combined controller uses xhigh; Workers use the bounded high range.
Device capacity changes CELL size, never required GO outcomes.
Readiness precedes exact-plan simulation, and only manual START authorizes formal work.
forbidden_interpretations: Simulation can compensate for a failed Eval.

answers.rationale: The threshold is exact 24/24 and retries use the full bank with a new seed.
Accepted work is immutable while approved added work raises the denominator.
forbidden_interpretations: Reset progress or conceal added work.

answers.rationale: Evidence review drives append-only planning, total updates, and revision simulation.
Checking stops dispatch, supervision resolves or escalates, then checking revalidates.
forbidden_interpretations: Dispatch while the condition remains absent.

answers.rationale: A configured Goal is a final Supervisor gate and GOAL_GAP continues the loop.
Every CELL uses its complete GO profile; mismatch requires planned redesign.
Split semantically before 1000 lines and keep a compact current-state index.
AFTER is an absolute accepted-CELL threshold.
forbidden_interpretations: Treat the value as a relative increment.

answers.rationale: An active CELL reaches its normal validated and repaired boundary before pause.
SLK has no timed initial-start command.
Resume preserves the same persistent Worker conversation.
Cancellation changes only pending control and never interrupts active work.
Command IDs are idempotent and cannot duplicate transitions or assignments.
A control command cannot reopen COMPLETE.
VERSION, README, canonical metadata, global content, remote main, and annotated tag must align.
